message:
fix(installer): respect CARGO_TARGET_DIR when building from source via curl

Problem:
--------
When users ran the curl installer and no pre-built binaries were available
for their platform, the installer would fall back to building from source
via the `clone_and_build_from_source()` function. After a successful build,
the installer would fail with:

    ✗ Binary not found after build: rch

This occurred because the function hardcoded the binary location as
`$TEMP_DIR/rch/target/release/` without checking the CARGO_TARGET_DIR
environment variable. When users have CARGO_TARGET_DIR set (common for
Rust developers who want to control where build artifacts are placed),
cargo places the binaries in `$CARGO_TARGET_DIR/release/` instead.

The `build_from_source()` function (used when running install.sh from
within a cloned repo) already handled this correctly, but the curl-based
installation path did not.

Root cause:
-----------
Line 705 in clone_and_build_from_source():
    local target_dir="$TEMP_DIR/rch/target/release"

This ignored CARGO_TARGET_DIR, causing a mismatch between where cargo
placed the binaries and where the installer looked for them.

Solution:
---------
Updated clone_and_build_from_source() to check CARGO_TARGET_DIR, matching
the behavior of build_from_source():

    local target_dir
    if [[ -n "${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-}" ]]; then
        target_dir="$CARGO_TARGET_DIR/release"
    else
        target_dir="$TEMP_DIR/rch/target/release"
    fi

Also updated INSTALLER_VERSION from "0.1.0" to "1.0.1" to match the
workspace version, providing consistency between the installer's
self-reported version and the actual RCH version being installed.

Testing:
--------
Users with CARGO_TARGET_DIR set can now successfully install RCH via:

    curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/.../install.sh" | bash

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ set -euo pipefail
 # Configuration
 # ============================================================================
 
-INSTALLER_VERSION="0.1.0"
+INSTALLER_VERSION="1.0.1"
 VERSION=""  # Set dynamically based on install mode
 REPO_URL="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
 GITHUB_REPO="Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
@@ -701,8 +701,13 @@ clone_and_build_from_source() {
         fi
     fi
 
-    # Install binaries
-    local target_dir="$TEMP_DIR/rch/target/release"
+    # Install binaries - respect CARGO_TARGET_DIR if set
+    local target_dir
+    if [[ -n "${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-}" ]]; then
+        target_dir="$CARGO_TARGET_DIR/release"
+    else
+        target_dir="$TEMP_DIR/rch/target/release"
+    fi
 
     if [[ "$MODE" == "worker" ]]; then
         if [[ -f "$target_dir/$WORKER_BIN" ]]; then
